subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the love of God!  It is some time since I wrote a letter
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر محبت الهیه چندیست که نامه ای ننگاشتم ولی در جمیع اوقات عجز و نیاز
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
